mapper.update: UPDATE post_comments SET content = #{content}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE post_comments SET content = '[已删除]', is_deleted = 1, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT c.*, u.username, u.real_name, u.avatar, CASE WHEN pcl.user_id IS NULL THEN FALSE ELSE TRUE END AS liked_by_current_user FROM post_comments c LEFT JOIN users u ON c.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN post_comment_likes pcl ON c.id = pcl.comment_id AND pcl.user_id = #{currentUserId} WHERE c.post_id = #{postId} ORDER BY COALESCE(c.parent_id, c.id), c.created_at ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT IGNORE INTO post_comment_likes (comment_id, user_id) VALUES (#{commentId}, #{userId})
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM post_comment_likes WHERE comment_id = #{commentId} AND user_id = #{userId}
mapper.update: UPDATE post_comments SET like_count = like_count + 1 WHERE id = #{commentId}
UPDATE post_comments SET like_count = GREATEST(like_count - 1, 0) WHERE id = #{commentId}
